response.overview: Take the sexually charged world of big time fashion photography, add to it an achingly beautiful twenty-two year old woman with talent, determination, and innocence, and see where fantasy meets reality in a passionate tale of ambition and lust.Laura, as performed by Kathleen Kristel, brings to the world of photography a freshness and sensuality rarely found. Under the guiding hand of Mark Emery, a top lensman, Laura learns the ins and outs of the world of desire, captured for all eternity by a camera that never lies. A world of gorgeous women, bodies gleaming under hot lights. Fantasies frozen in time... A world of ambition and lust!
response.title: Ambition & Lust
